meaning: n.天赐之物,意外获得的幸运
examples: This new benefit has come as a godsend for low-income families.
Pharmacists are a godsend when you don't feel sick enough to call the doctor.
The opening line read, "Dear Professor Godsend".
"People tell us it's a godsend, " says Mike Winch, Safeway's director of information technology.
And so we were very short on labor, and it was a real godsend for us.
